zh.lifeSummary: 當Margareta Mitton於大約1479年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾韋斯頓 武朋 特倫特時，她的父親John de Mytton41歲，母親Joan Middlemore35歲。她於1499年與Robertus Fullwood在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1533年2月16日在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾蕾托 阿爾內享年55歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭哈普爾克萊 霍爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margareta Mitton于大约1479年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾韋斯頓 武朋 特倫特时，她的父亲John de Mytton41岁，母亲Joan Middlemore35岁。她于1499年与Robertus Fullwood在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1533年2月16日在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾蕾托 阿爾內享年55岁，埋葬在英国英格兰哈普爾克萊 霍爾。

nameMeanings.name: Mitton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from any of the places in Lancashire, Yorkshire, and the West Midlands, so named in Old English as ‘farmstead at a river confluence’, from (ge)m̄ȳthe ‘river confluence’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Mitten
meanings: variant of   Mitton  . The English surname in this spelling has been established in Ireland (Wexford) since the early 17th century.
topographic name from Middle English midde + tune, for a dweller in the ‘middle of the village’.

nameMeanings.name: Margareta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margrethe
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretha
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margareta Mitton was born about 1479, in Weston upon Trent, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John de Mytton, was 41 and her mother, Joan Middlemore, was 35. She married Robertus Fullwood in 1499, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died on 16 February 1533, in Little Alne, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55, and was buried in Clay Hall, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margareta Mitton est née environ 1479, à Weston upon Trent, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Mytton, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Joan Middlemore, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Robertus Fullwood en 1499, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée le 16 février 1533, à Little Alne, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Clay Hall, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat 1499 in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Robertus Fullwood geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb am 16. ja.lifeSummary: Margareta Mittonが約1479年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアウエストン ウプオン トレントで生まれた時，父John de Myttonは41歳，母Joan Middlemoreは35歳であった。1499年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアでRobertus Fullwoodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1533年2月16日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアリットル アルンで55歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアクレイ ハルにて埋葬された。

ko.Tanworth, Warwick, England: 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 탠워스 인 아든
ko.Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 웨스턴 운더 리자르드
ko.lifeSummary: Margareta Mitton(이)가 대략 1479년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 웨스턴 업 트렌트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Mytton(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Middlemore(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1499년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 Robertus Fullwood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1533년 2월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 리틀 알니에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 클레이 홀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margareta Mitton nasceu aproximadamente 1479, em Weston upon Trent, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Mytton, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Joan Middlemore, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Robertus Fullwood em 1499, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 16 de fevereiro de 1533, em Little Alne, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Clay Hall, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margareta Mitton родилась около 1479 г. в местности вестон упон трент, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John de Mytton было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Middlemore, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robertus Fullwood в 1499 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла 16 февраля 1533 г. в местности литл алн, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности клеи холл, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.Tanworth, Warwick, England: Tanworth in Arden, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Engl: Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.Clay Hall, Warwickshire, England: Clay Hall, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.Little Alne, Warwickshire, England: Little Alne, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margareta Mitton nació aproximadamente 1479, en Weston upon Trent, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John de Mytton, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Joan Middlemore, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Robertus Fullwood en 1499, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 16 de febrero de 1533, en Little Alne, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Clay Hall, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
